name: Mr. Tenna [Deltarune]
description:
Always be together, fair and stormy weather

Never growing older, never growing colder

Always be together, now and for forever

Ever and ever and ever and ever

Mix the two and you'll have exactly what's going on in my mind 24/7 lol I am NOT well :’D

I don't know how many ideas with this guy I can have, but you KNOW I'll be trying every single scenario I think for him. Consider this my proper apology for not posting for so long QwQ

If you have any scenarios ideas, pls let me know, I would love to hear it! <3

Also, TRIGGER WARNING for possibly a yandere-ish Tenna? I recommend you reading the scenario before interacting, just to be safe
